creator: avg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #0)
Could you please clarify what hangs -- the whole system or just sysctl process?
If the latter, then you should be able to start gathering some details like procstat -kk output for the process.

Or you can donate an Orange Pi PC2 to me and I'll do all the figuring out myself (eventually) :-)
